title: [codereview] coap_dtn.c: coap_respond and handlers lack DTN/SenML provider callback integration and robustness
description: Handlers still return 0 instead of using coap_respond(COAP_RESPONSE_CODE_*, ...). No use of lichen_dtn_* or senml_encode_* per spec and bead title. Missing include may still be needed for full COAP_RESPONSE_CODE_* resolution (see coap_location.c which uses additional headers). No logging on errors. Fix all before closing main bead. lichen/subsys/lichen/coap/coap_dtn.c:14
